rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing study’s core problem: both focus on digital product/app usage under reward architectures and potential overuse/dark-side effects (cited: reward timing/notifications/time limits with habit/satiation; citing: hybrid rewards, flow, and value-detracting effects). The cited work also provides a closely related high-frequency behavioral modeling precedent (continuous-time usage model), making it a plausible mechanism/foundational source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
